channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump administration launches new fraud crackdown on health insurers and drug middlemen
item.description: The Trump administration has ordered insurers to investigate fraud in federal employee health programs that cost taxpayers roughly $70 billion annually.

item.title: Trump signs bill providing nearly $70 billion for immigration enforcement
item.description: President Donald Trump signed a law Wednesday that allocates nearly $70 billion to support his immigration and deportation policies.

item.title: Senator Blackburn criticizes Democrats' ICE vote as disrespectful
item.description: Sen. Marsha Blackburn, R-Tenn., denounced Democrats on Wednesday for what she called a childish and disrespectful refusal to back immigration enforcement funding.

item.title: Ruben Gallego's latest effort to manage Swalwell scandal fallout faces early difficulties
